hybrid.name: age_of_house
hybrid.idea: Calculate the age of the house at the time of sale, which might correlate with its price.

hybrid.name: remodel_age
hybrid.idea: Calculate the age of the last remodel at the time of sale, which might affect the house's value.

hybrid.name: total_bathrooms
hybrid.idea: Sum of all bathrooms (full and half) to capture the total bathroom count, which is a key feature for house pricing.

hybrid.name: total_porch_area
hybrid.idea: Sum of all porch areas to capture the total outdoor space, which can be a significant factor in house pricing.

hybrid.name: quality_condition_index
hybrid.idea: Combine overall quality and condition into a single index to capture the general state of the house.

hybrid.name: remodel_age

hybrid.name: garage_age
